parameters.query:
SELECT
    ai.application_id, a.company_name, a.job_title, a.pipeline_track,
    ai.scheduled_at, ai.interview_type, ai.location, ai.platform
FROM application_interviews ai
JOIN applications a ON ai.application_id = a.id
WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND ai.status = 'scheduled'
  AND ai.scheduled_at BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY ai.scheduled_at ASC;

SELECT company_name, job_title, pipeline_track, current_state, offer_at
FROM applications
WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND current_state IN ('offer_received', 'negotiating')
ORDER BY offer_at DESC;

SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND applied_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS apps_this_week,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_state = 'rejected' AND resolved_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS rejections_this_week,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_state = 'ghosted' AND ghosting_detected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS ghosted_this_week,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE acknowledged_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS acks_this_week,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE first_interview_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS interviews_this_week
FROM applications;

SELECT pipeline_track, current_state, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM applications
WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND is_active = true
GROUP BY pipeline_track, current_state
ORDER BY pipeline_track, current_state;

SELECT
    COALESCE(discovery_source, 'unknown') AS source,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND current_state NOT IN ('applied', 'ghosted', 'expired')) AS responded,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN
        ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_state NOT IN ('applied', 'ghosted', 'expired'))::numeric / COUNT(*)::numeric * 100, 0)
    ELSE 0 END AS response_pct
FROM applications
WHERE applied_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY discovery_source
ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT a.company_name, a.job_title, a.current_state, a.pipeline_track,
       a.next_follow_up_at
FROM applications a
WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND a.is_active = true
  AND a.next_follow_up_at <= NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND a.next_follow_up_at IS NOT NULL
  AND (a.follow_up_snoozed_until IS NULL OR a.follow_up_snoozed_until < NOW())
ORDER BY a.next_follow_up_at ASC
LIMIT 10;

INSERT INTO notification_log (tenant_id, notification_type, recipient, jobs_included, status) VALUES ('{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}', 'weekly_summary', '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.notification_email }}', {{ $('Assemble Report').item.json.activeCount }}, 'sent');
SELECT id AS tenant_id, name AS tenant_name, notification_email, candidate_profile, search_config, email_config FROM tenants WHERE is_active = true

SELECT
    ai.application_id, a.company_name, a.job_title, a.pipeline_track,
    ai.scheduled_at, ai.interview_type, ai.location, ai.platform
FROM application_interviews ai
JOIN applications a ON ai.application_id = a.id
WHERE ai.status = 'scheduled'
  AND ai.scheduled_at BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY ai.scheduled_at ASC;

SELECT company_name, job_title, pipeline_track, current_state, offer_at
FROM applications
WHERE current_state IN ('offer_received', 'negotiating')
ORDER BY offer_at DESC;

SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE applied_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS apps_this_week,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_state = 'rejected' AND resolved_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS rejections_this_week,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_state = 'ghosted' AND ghosting_detected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS ghosted_this_week,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE acknowledged_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS acks_this_week,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE first_interview_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS interviews_this_week
FROM applications;

SELECT pipeline_track, current_state, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM applications
WHERE is_active = true
GROUP BY pipeline_track, current_state
ORDER BY pipeline_track, current_state;

SELECT
    COALESCE(discovery_source, 'unknown') AS source,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_state NOT IN ('applied', 'ghosted', 'expired')) AS responded,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN
        ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_state NOT IN ('applied', 'ghosted', 'expired'))::numeric / COUNT(*)::numeric * 100, 0)
    ELSE 0 END AS response_pct
FROM applications
WHERE applied_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY discovery_source
ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT a.company_name, a.job_title, a.current_state, a.pipeline_track,
       a.next_follow_up_at
FROM applications a
WHERE a.is_active = true
  AND a.next_follow_up_at <= NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND a.next_follow_up_at IS NOT NULL
  AND (a.follow_up_snoozed_until IS NULL OR a.follow_up_snoozed_until < NOW())
ORDER BY a.next_follow_up_at ASC
LIMIT 10;

VALUES ('weekly_summary', 'chellamma.uk@gmail.com', {{ $('Assemble Report').item.json.activeCount }}, 'sent');
